heading: Filing requirements
label: 40302 Filing requirements

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: A true copy of every agreement referred to in section 40301(a) or (b) of this title shall be filed with the Federal Maritime Commission. If the agreement is oral, a complete memorandum specifying in detail the substance of the agreement shall be filed.
an agreement related to transportation to be performed within or between foreign countries; or
an agreement among common carriers to establish, operate, or maintain a marine terminal in the United States.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: c .—Regulations
children.text: The Commission may by regulation prescribe the form and manner in which an agreement shall be filed and any additional information and documents necessary to evaluate the agreement.
